overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city. The camera moves past neon-lit food stalls, palm trees, and modern glass towers, eventually reaching a plaza with people relaxing under a wooden pergola structure. The footage is from a video game engine with high-quality cinematic rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a vibrant purple neon food stall on a futuristic waterfront promenade. The camera moves forward past a tripod setup, with palm trees lining the left side and a massive modern glass tower visible ahead on the right. The morning sun casts long shadows across the paved walkway.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the waterfront walkway, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction. The massive commercial tower looms larger on the right, while a distinctive wooden pergola structure comes into view ahead. The path remains open to the sky with the waterfront visible on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered walkway beneath a dramatic wooden pergola with curved arches. The lighting becomes diffused as the canopy filters the morning sun. Concrete benches line the right side where individuals are seated, and the path opens ahead into a wider plaza area.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the pergola into a wide open plaza bathed in morning sunlight. Groups of people are gathered in folding chairs, socializing in the open space. The waterfront is visible to the left with palm trees swaying, while the massive commercial tower remains visible in the background to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from a vibrant street scene into a sun-drenched social plaza. It begins by gliding past a purple neon food stall and tripod setup, moving along a paved walkway lined with palm trees while a massive glass tower looms in the distance under the morning sun. As the camera advances past oncoming pedestrians, the open waterfront view on the left persists while the towering commercial building grows larger on the right. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a semi-covered walkway, where the lighting becomes diffused beneath the curved arches of a dramatic wooden pergola and concrete benches line the path. Finally, the camera emerges from the canopy into a wide, bright plaza where groups of people socialize in folding chairs against a backdrop of swaying palms and the distant city skyline.
